preservedBehaviors: group-video screen renders WebView with Jitsi meet URL
group-video screen supports audio-only mode via query param
group-video screen has external link button to open in browser
group-chat screen has video call and audio call buttons
group-video screen shows Expo Go warning
group-video screen sets WebView error from onHttpError
group-video screen has javaScriptEnabled and domStorageEnabled
group-chat startVideoCall navigates to group-video with audio=0
group-chat startAudioCall navigates to group-video with audio=1
group-chat always navigates to group-video screen
group-chat startVideoCall and startAudioCall have groupId as dependency
group-video screen uses description from httpError event in error message
group-video Expo Go warning uses yellow/amber background color
